content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
P: allow_provider_skew ∧ edge_rejects_valid
V: min_fix ∧ reg_test
A: widen_tolerance ∧ add_skew_test ∧ preserve("401")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Plan: allow_provider_skew and edge_rejects_valid.
Verify: min_fix and reg_test.
Answer target: widen_tolerance and add_skew_test and preserve("401").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: overdue_middleware ∧ rule:overdue⇒402 ∧ grace("24h")
P: within_grace ⇒ skip_charge ∧ past_grace ⇒ emit("402") ∧ boundary_exact("24h")
V: no_loop_at_boundary ∧ reg_test_passes ∧ min_diff
A: clamp_grace("24h") ∧ guard_boundary_lte ∧ add_reg_test ∧ return_past_grace("402")

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: billing overdue middleware and rule:overdue implies 402 and grace("24h").
Plan: within_grace implies skip_charge and past_grace implies emit("402") and boundary_exact("24h").
Verify: no_loop_at_boundary and reg_test_passes and min_diff.
Answer target: clamp_grace("24h") and guard_boundary_lte and add_reg_test and return_past_grace("402").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_architecture
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady) ∧ split(compliance_ready)
P: small_team ∧ tight_deadline ∧ relational_store ∧ bounded_ops ∧ predictable_load
V: modular_monolith ∧ pg_first ∧ seam_for_split ∧ low_ops_overhead
A: deliver(modular_monolith) ∧ why(ship_fast_split_later)

[AUDIT]
Goal: choose_architecture.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady) and split(compliance_ready).
Plan: small_team and tight_deadline and relational_store and bounded_ops and predictable_load.
Verify: modular_monolith and pg_first and seam_for_split and low_ops_overhead.
Answer target: deliver(modular_monolith) and why(ship_fast_split_later).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: ship_enrichment
C: "6" ∧ "9 weeks" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pg_queue ∧ idempotent_jobs ∧ shared_schema
V: tight_ddl ∧ small_team ∧ one_store
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: ship_enrichment.
Constraints: "6" and "9 weeks" and "PostgreSQL" and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker_sidecar and pg_queue and idempotent_jobs and shared_schema.
Verify: tight_ddl and small_team and one_store.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short_why.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
C: unsanitized_input ∧ ".." ∧ "download" ∧ path_concat
P: reject("..") ∧ normalize_path ∧ confine_baseDir ∧ whitelist_files
V: traversal_blocked ∧ escapes_baseDir_denied ∧ tests_pass
A: sanitize_req.query.file ∧ path.resolve ∧ verify_prefix_baseDir ∧ reject_outside

[AUDIT]
Goal: path traversal risk mitigation.
Constraints: unsanitized_input and ".." and "download" and path_concat.
Plan: reject("..") and validate and normalize path and confine_baseDir and whitelist_files.
Verify: traversal_blocked and escapes_baseDir_denied and tests_pass.
Answer target: validate req.query.file and path.resolve and verify_prefix_baseDir and reject_outside.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input ∧ string_concat
P: sqli_risk ∧ unsafe_order_by ∧ no_whitelist
V: parameterize ∧ whitelist_columns ∧ validate_sort_dir
A: reject_unlisted ∧ use_allowlist ∧ test_injection_payloads

[AUDIT]
Goal: SQL injection risk mitigation.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input and string_concat.
Plan: sqli_risk and unsafe_order_by and no_whitelist.
Verify: validate then parameterize and whitelist_columns and validate_sort_dir.
Answer target: reject_unlisted and use_allowlist and test_injection_payloads.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_reconcileBatch ∧ uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ uses("next(err)")
P: preserve_order ∧ load_batch→db.fetchRows ∧ db.fetchRows→apply_rules ∧ apply_rules→db.save ∧ db.save→emit_metrics
V: async_await_used ∧ db_err_calls("next(err)") ∧ minimal_diff ∧ anchors_preserved
A: wrap_async ∧ await_db.fetchRows ∧ await_db.save ∧ try_catch→"next(err)" ∧ keep_emit_metrics

[AUDIT]
Goal: async reconcileBatch refactor.
Constraints: has_reconcileBatch and uses("async") and uses("await") and uses("next(err)").
Plan: preserve_order and load_batch then db.fetchRows and db.fetchRows then apply_rules and apply_rules then db.save and db.save then emit_metrics.
Verify: async_await_used and db_err_calls("next(err)") and minimal_diff and anchors_preserved.
Answer target: wrap_async and await_db.fetchRows and await_db.save and try_catch then "next(err)" and keep_emit_metrics.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check → db.findUser → flags.load → audit.log → next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_via_next ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: async_await ∧ wrap_db_findUser ∧ try_catch_next_err ∧ preserve_callsites

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: session_check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_via_next and anchors_verbatim.
Answer target: async/await and wrap_db_findUser and try_catch_next_err and preserve_callsites.
